title: How (and why) to take a logarithm of an image
summary: 3Blue1Brown explores the mathematical concept of taking a logarithm of an image through the lens of Escher's Print Gallery and conformal maps from complex analysis. The video demonstrates how the complex logarithm can transform recursive self-similar patterns and explains the deeper mathematical structures using interactive visualization and animation.
